Class NumberAdapter<N extends Number>

java.lang.Object
iu.client.NumberAdapter<N>
Type Parameters:
N - number type
All Implemented Interfaces:
IuJsonAdapter<N>
class NumberAdapter<N extends Number> extends Object implements IuJsonAdapter<N>
Implements IuJsonAdapter for Number
